mapper.update: UPDATE refresh_job_item SET status = #{status}, started_at = #{startedAt}, error_message = NULL WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND room_id = #{roomId} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE refresh_job_item SET status = 'SUCCESS', finished_at = #{finishedAt}, error_message = NULL WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND room_id = #{roomId} AND status = 'RUNNING'
